description: Composition Black printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, black yoke with silver stitch detailing, three-quarter sleeves with tape detailing at the cuffs and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by traditional Indian print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The mix-and-match print along the hem and silver thread detailing on the yoke add zing to the garment. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
